pageSubtitle: Pulse, sleep, and steps from your devices.
connectIos: Connect Apple Health on iOS, or add a row manually.
noTrendData: No data yet for this metric
comparisonSubtitle: Where you fall in your demographic, today.
insightBelow: {{metric}} is below the typical range for your demographic.
insightAbove: {{metric}} is above the typical range for your demographic.
insightNormal: {{metric}} sits comfortably in the normal range.
insightHrSteady: Heart rate has been steady all week.
educationalDisclaimer: For educational comparison only — not medical advice.
addManuallyHint: Log a one-off reading or backfill missing days.
dateInFuture: Date can't be in the future.
dateTooOld: Date can't be more than 1 year ago.
